memory.summary: I have a free afternoon but my term project is barely started, so I should prioritize work over leisure or chores despite having low energy and stress.
I spent 0.5 hours on a trivial chore, which barely moved the needle but drained some energy while my term project remains untouched.
I wasted another hour on a trivial chore while my term project remains barely started, and my energy is slipping away.
After 1.5 hours of trivial chores, my term project remains untouched and my energy is depleting further.
Another 1.5 hours on trivial chores has further depleted my energy while my term project remains completely untouched.
After 1.5 more hours on trivial chores, my energy is critically low and the term project remains untouched.
I spent another hour on trivial chores, making minimal progress while my energy remains critically low and the term project is still untouched.
I spent another 0.5 hours on a trivial chore, gaining negligible progress while my energy remains critically low and the term project is still untouched.
After four consecutive hours of trivial chores, my energy is critically low and the term project remains untouched.
The trivial chore deadline passed unfinished, and despite 1.5 hours of effort, my energy is critically low while the term project remains untouched.
Despite working another hour, my energy is critically depleted and the term project remains untouched.
After eight hours of sleep, my energy is fully restored to 9.6, and I am no longer depleted.
